column1: Strategy: ADOPT the AllenAI vla-evaluation-harness (pip install vla-eval, Apache-2.0) as the sim-eval backend - it ships 14 benchmarks, Docker, 47x batch-parallel eval, and Claude Code skills to add models/benchmarks. Build FIRST-PARTY only for export-validation + real-hardware (our differentiators). TRACK real-robot boards (not locally runnable). Filter by Action / Axis / Priority. Snapshot 11 Jun 2026.
